response: The "Virtual Choir"-noted conductor who has created works for the Austin-based ensemble Conspirare is Eric Whitacre. He is known for his "Virtual Choir" projects, where he brings individual voices from around the world together into an online choir. Whitacre has commissioned works from composers such as David Lang, Tarik O'Regan, and Eric Whitacre himself, and he has collaborated with Conspirare on their sixth Grammy-nominated album, "The Sacred Spirit of Russia," which won the 2015 Grammy Award for Best Choral Performance.
